prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.4 kg; Height 165.7 cm; BMI 24.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 119/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.1%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.6%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 194mg/dL; 9 months ago 165mg/dL; 6 months ago 188mg/dL; 3 months ago 184mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 68.3kg; 9 months ago 65.7kg; 6 months ago 65.8kg; 3 months ago 61.9kg; current 68.4kg), Height (12 months ago 165.7cm; 9 months ago 165.7cm; 6 months ago 165.7cm; 3 months ago 165.7cm; current 165.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 119mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 76mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 17U/L), AST (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 26U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; current 23mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 319mg/g; 9 months ago 479mg/g; 6 months ago 399mg/g; 3 months ago 429mg/g; current 400mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 69mg/dL; 6 months ago 76mg/dL; 3 months ago 70mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 59mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 138mg/dL; 9 months ago 138mg/dL; 6 months ago 157mg/dL; 3 months ago 136mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 11.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
